findings.finding: Document addresses the falsifiability condition: This design is wrong if wide raised mode still reads primarily as two equal left/right halves with implementation permanently reserved even when empty.
Document addresses the falsifiability condition: This design is wrong if branch/workspace identity still bleeds directly into Design Tree with no clear structural separation.
Document addresses the falsifiability condition: This design is wrong if responsive collapse changes semantic ordering rather than only changing grouping and density.
